MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Brick & Timber, INC. is present, represented by Kuahiwi Kahapea
Attorney Dylan Tong for the plaintiff.
Defendant Morgan Weeks and Ruisin Jennings are present.
Attorney Sydney Chase appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The litigants and counsel hold settlement discussions with JPT Aaron Gruber. This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of DEC-23-24 is vacated. (d501)
